ItacPersonItem.Notes: Also known as Jacomo da Campania, see William Eamon, `The Canker Friar`, in Piety and Plague from Byzantium to the Baroque, ed. Franco Mormando, Thomas Worcester (Truman State University Press, 2007).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
